translation.en: I will come at this time.

exampleSentencesTranslated: She opens the door at seven o'clock.
sentenceBreakdowns: Chúng ta (we) + gặp (meet) + nhau (each other) + lúc (at) + sáu (six) + giờ (o'clock)
Chị (she) + mở (open) + cửa (door) + lúc (at) + bảy (seven) + giờ (o'clock)
notes:
lúc = at (a specific time) or when (a moment in time).

It’s used before a clear time point: hours, parts of the day, or specific moments.  

It can also mean “when” to talk about a situation in the past or present.  

Very close to khi (“when”), but lúc feels a bit more concrete, like pointing to a specific moment.

definitions.vi: Một thời điểm trong thời gian.

exampleSentences: Chúng ta gặp nhau lúc sáu giờ.
Chị mở cửa lúc bảy giờ.
notes_md:
**lúc** = *at* (a specific time) or *when* (a moment in time).

It’s used before a clear time point: hours, parts of the day, or specific moments.  

It can also mean “when” to talk about a situation in the past or present.  

Very close to **khi** (“when”), but *lúc* feels a bit more concrete, like pointing to a specific moment.

translation.en: I will come at this time.
